title: rubus ulmifolius var. bouvetii
intro: Rubus ulmifolius var. bouvetii is a rare, thorny, and woody shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It is a variant of the European blackberry bush (Rubus ulmifolius), known for its medicinal properties due to the presence of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations from Rubus ulmifolius var. bouvetii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
